title: One user can't SSH in while others can
description_md:
The `deploy` user can no longer SSH into this box, but other accounts work fine. Its key and permissions are correct. An access-control tweak to the sshd config locked it out. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find the directive that's excluding `deploy`, allow it back in, and reload sshd.

A test key is at `~/deploy_key` (`ssh -i ~/deploy_key deploy@localhost`). You're done when that key login succeeds.
